name: Agency
description: A brutalist-modern system for creative studios: bone canvas, near-black ink, one electric cobalt accent, oversized display type and hairline grid rules. Built for agency sites, studio portfolios, and case-study pages.
whenToUse: Pick for a confident creative or digital agency, design studio, or production house: a type-led homepage, selected-work case studies, a capabilities list, and a bold project enquiry. The voice is editorial and brutalist-modern — oversized tight-tracked display type, monospace index labels, hairline grid borders, near-square corners, and a single electric cobalt accent on a bone off-white canvas. It reads loud and self-assured, the opposite of a soft corporate SaaS page or a quiet warm portfolio. Avoid for longform reading, dashboards, e-commerce catalogs, or any product that needs a calm, trustworthy, low-contrast tone.
